execution_summary: We built an R 4.4.1 tidyverse-based Docker image with required system libraries (cmake, pkg-config, make, libnlopt-dev) and R packages (lmerTest, lme4, MuMIn, reshape, tidyverse). We fixed the analysis script to install packages to a user-writable path at runtime and corrected the bilingual classification bug. After approval, we executed the R script inside the container. The main three-level mixed-effects model and domain-specific models ran successfully, outputting fixed effects, standard errors, p-values, standardized coefficients, and R-squared metrics. No major deviations from the preregistration aside from dependency fixes and correcting the bilingual indicator coding bug.

code_executed.command: Docker build via orchestrator_build_image with image tag replication-exec
code_executed.logs: Image built from generated Dockerfile based on rocker/tidyverse:4.4.1. Installed system deps (cmake, pkg-config, make, libnlopt-dev) and R packages (lmerTest, lme4, MuMIn, reshape, reshape2, dplyr, tidyr, readr, stringr).
code_executed.environment: Docker image replication-exec; Base: rocker/tidyverse:4.4.1; System: cmake, pkg-config, make, libnlopt-dev; R libraries preinstalled.

code_executed.logs: Executed inside container after human approval. lmerTest, lme4, tidyverse, MuMIn, reshape loaded. Three-level models converged. Key outputs: Overall model bilingual coefficient 0.3525 (SE 0.0258), t=13.687, p<2e-16; standardized 0.0806 (SE 0.0059). Domain models: writing bilingual 0.5667 (SE 0.0497), t=11.398, p<2e-16; reading bilingual 0.2342 (SE 0.0358), t=6.535, p=7.01e-11; listening bilingual 0.2655 (SE 0.0216), t=12.316, p<2e-16. R2m/R2c for overall: 0.0955/0.526.
code_executed.environment: R 4.4.1 within Docker; Packages: lmerTest 3.2-1, lme4 2.0-1, MuMIn (installed for R 4.4), tidyverse 2.0.0, reshape 0.8.10.

results.hypothesis_tested: Students who regularly speak a minority (non-instructional) language at home (bilingual) will have higher English achievement than monolingual peers, controlling for age, gender, SES, parental education, and cultural capital, excluding students speaking English at home.

findings_summary.confidence_interval: Not directly reported; SE suggests tight CI
findings_summary.effect_size: Standardized beta ≈ 0.0806 (SE 0.0059); Marginal R^2 ≈ 0.0955; Conditional R^2 ≈ 0.526

tables.table_description: Fixed effects for bilingual and controls with random intercepts for schools nested in countries; marginal and conditional R^2 reported.
tables.table_file: Console output only; no table file produced.

tables.table_description: Separate mixed-effects models for writing, reading, listening with same covariates; standardized coefficients and R^2 reported.
tables.table_file: Console output only; no table file produced.
